meta.title: APES CIC website rebuild mood board
meta.summary: Eight single-image visual territories for the APES Cloudron LAMP rebuild.
meta.brief: Association of Protecting Exotic Species CIC public website rebuild
meta.goal: Unify APES branding across the rebuilt Cloudron LAMP site.

items.title: Rescue threshold at first light
items.caption: A calm arrival moment that suggests urgency without panic.
items.source: APES public rescue and continuity brief
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of a modest community-animal rescue entrance at first light, ramp access, clean teal-painted doorway, soft mint reflections on wet pavement, one secure animal carrier near the door, warm interior glow, calm overcast British morning, trustworthy non-profit atmosphere, no readable text, no logos, no collage, no people facing camera.

items.title: Reception desk with quiet authority
items.caption: A humane front-of-house mood for contact, guidance and triage.
items.motif: welcome desk, support route, human clarity
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of a welfare organisation reception desk in natural window light, rounded oak counter, teal ceramic mug, soft mint paperwork trays, one analogue desk bell, calm organised atmosphere, warm sand wall tone, practical non-corporate styling, shallow depth of field, no readable text, no logos, no UI, not a collage.

items.title: Care preparation station
items.caption: A clean, capable care setup that feels gentle rather than clinical.
items.source: APES pet care, rehabilitation and boarding content
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of a tidy exotic-animal care preparation station, stainless steel table, folded soft mint towels, teal nitrile gloves, glass terrarium edge, neatly arranged care tools, diffuse daylight, crisp but humane atmosphere, restrained aqua accents, no readable labels, no logos, no collage, no split panels.

items.title: Donation urgency still life
items.caption: Warm appeal energy without sales-first charity cliches.
items.source: APES donation and relocation appeal routes
items.prompt: Single composed still life for a non-profit donation appeal, coral-toned transport crate edge, folded blanket, teal clipboard, small stack of care receipts turned away from camera, warm sand tabletop, soft directional light, subtle urgency, emotionally direct but professional, no readable text, no logos, no money cliches, not a mood board layout.

items.title: Rounded trust materials
items.caption: A tactile material study for cards, metrics and structured callouts.
items.prompt: Single top-down material study of rounded paper cards, teal acrylic tokens, soft mint note sheets, warm sand backing board, one coral accent object, elegant spacing, crisp editorial lighting, tactile interface inspiration for a charity website, no readable text, no icons, no UI labels, no collage or grid.

items.title: Educational visit setup
items.caption: Community learning with warmth, safety and curiosity.
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of an educational outreach room prepared for an exotic-animal visit, semicircle of chairs, one closed terrarium on a sturdy table, warm community hall light, teal and mint learning props, calm anticipation, no visible faces, no readable signage, no logos, no collage, one coherent scene.

items.title: Habitat texture and restraint
items.caption: A close tactile mood for welfare, conservation and species respect.
items.prompt: Single macro-style visual reference image of exotic-animal habitat textures, soft sage foliage, warm sand substrate, hint of reptile scale texture at edge of frame, dew-like highlights, teal shadow tones, highly tactile but calm, conservation-minded atmosphere, no visible injury, no readable text, no collage.

items.title: Community building at dusk
items.caption: A credible public-facing mood for footer, governance and continuity.
items.source: APES footer, contact and governance requirements
items.motif: community site, evening light, public trust
items.prompt: Single exterior evening photograph of a modest British community building with softly lit windows, deep teal doorway, clean pavement after rain, reassuring non-profit atmosphere, subtle warm interior glow, believable and humble, no readable street signs, no logos, no people posing, not a collage.
